[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110100 3
1 1010000000 2
2 1001100000 3
3 0010010000 2
4 0000110100 3
5 1010000000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 0001100010 3
12 1010000001 3
23 0100000110 3
34 0010010000 2 match 3

67 0000111101 5
70 0000000000 a match 6 7
